reviews.comment:
Tremendos los sanguchessss!!!!! Comimos el de matambre y queso con manteca. Lo compartimos entre dos. 16.800 pesos. Mas la bebida. El fiambre muy abundnte y riquisimo!!!!

(Translated by Google)
The sandwiches were amazing! We had the matambre and cheese sandwich with butter. We shared it between two. 16,800 pesos. Plus the drink. The cold cuts were very generous and delicious!
